economic_notes: Collaboration Agreement with Goldcorp Canada Ltd. receiving 0.5% variable payment plus $450,000 annual community payments. Exploration accommodation agreement with Evolution Mining (Rubicon Minerals) receiving 1% of exploration expenditures up to $250,000 annually. Agreement with Pure Gold Mining Inc. for 1% of exploration expenditures plus capacity costs and education/training. Exploration agreement with Great Bear Resources Ltd. and Lac Seul First Nation with 50,000 common shares received on signing plus quarterly drilling payments. Wabauskang Community Trust established for Industry Agreement revenues from mining companies.
notes: Audit is qualified because budget comparison figures were not presented in the financial statements, which is a departure from PSAS. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated in the provided text (signed as Chartered Professional Accountants, Kenora, Ontario). Fiscal year is 2021 but audit report signed January 17, 2024 — significant delay. Wabauskang Community Trust is consolidated within the entity. Portfolio investments of $7,272,829 are restricted Community Trust assets. Segmented disclosure shows government transfers total of $3,541,882 which differs from Note 13 total of $3,080,380 — the segmented figure may include non-government transfers allocated differently. Cash split: unrestricted $867,865 and restricted RBC Community Trust $260,172. No schedule of remuneration included in provided statements. COVID-19 note references impacts subsequent to year-end.
